name: nonstructured-regression
description: Tier 2 non-structured regression gate. Ensures that structured kernel changes do not regress performance for benchmarks that follow non-stencil patterns (BLAS, reductions, elementwise, streaming).

steps.name: regression-check
steps.description: Single 16-thread regression check for non-structured benchmarks. Any regression beyond tolerance indicates that structured kernel changes have leaked into generic lowering paths.
